name: Credex Auto Title Loans South Orlando
description_short: Credex provides auto title loans in Orlando with loan amounts from $750–$5,000, no credit checks, and same-day approval. You keep your vehicle while borrowing against its equity.
description_long:
Credex is an auto equity loan provider operating in the Orlando, Florida area and surrounding counties (Miami-Dade, Broward, West Palm Beach). The company positions itself as a solution for borrowers rejected by traditional lenders due to poor credit scores. Founded over 20+ years ago (exact founding year not specified on site), Credex operates under the Florida Consumer Finance Act (Florida Statute 516) as a licensed lender.

Credex specializes in auto title loans ranging from $750 to $5,000, with approval decisions made primarily on the borrower's ability to repay and vehicle condition rather than credit score. The application process is streamlined: applicants provide proof of residence, income, and a national ID, then receive appraisal and funding in as little as one day. Repayment terms range from 6 to 24 months, with APRs between 18% and 35.95% (maximum). A $25 application fee applies. The company explicitly states borrowers keep both the cash and their vehicle.

Credex differentiates itself through high approval rates (claims over 98% of applications approved), transparent fee disclosures with illustrative loan examples, fair lending commitments, and accessibility features on their website. They maintain a physical location at 1300 S Semoran Blvd, Orlando, with in-person service Monday–Friday 9am–6pm and Saturday 9am–2pm. The company prominently warns against advance-fee scams and provides verification contact details.

However, this remains a high-cost lending product. APRs of 33–35% significantly exceed payday-alternative thresholds (36% cap) and approach predatory lending territory. While borrowers retain vehicle use, the title serves as collateral, creating default risk. The company's claims of 98%+ approval rates and minimal credit evaluation suggest a business model heavily dependent on high interest rates to offset risk. This product is best suited only for borrowers with immediate cash needs who cannot access alternatives and fully understand the cost implications.
pros: No credit check required — approval based on ability to repay and vehicle condition
Same-day or next-day funding available for qualified borrowers
Keeps your vehicle — you retain possession and use while loan is active
Flexible repayment terms from 6 to 24 months to match borrower cash flow
Transparent fee disclosure with specific loan examples showing APR, payments, and totals
High approval rate (claims 98%+) accessible to borrowers rejected elsewhere
Licensed under Florida Consumer Finance Act with anti-scam protections in place
Physical location in Orlando with extended hours (open Saturday mornings)
cons: High APR range (18–35.95%) significantly exceeds payday-alternative limits and typical personal loan rates
Title held as collateral — vehicle can be repossessed if loan defaults, creating repayment pressure
Loan amounts capped at $5,000, limiting utility for larger emergencies or debt consolidation
Approval heavily dependent on vehicle value, not income or creditworthiness, creating affordability blind spots
Requires vehicle ownership and clean title — excludes renters and those with outstanding liens
best_for: Borrowers with poor/no credit who need $750–$5,000 in 1–2 days and own a vehicle outright
Those facing immediate cash emergencies (medical, utility shutoff, eviction notice) with no bank access
Consumers who cannot qualify for credit cards, personal loans, or payday alternatives due to credit history
Vehicle owners willing to accept high APR costs for speed and guaranteed approval
diagnosis: Credex is best for borrowers with owned vehicles who face urgent cash needs ($750–$5,000) within 1–2 days and have exhausted or been rejected by conventional credit sources. The main caveat is the 18–35.95% APR, which is a high-cost emergency borrowing option; this should only be considered when faster/cheaper alternatives (credit cards, credit union loans, employer advances, family loans) are truly unavailable and the borrower fully understands the collateral risk and total repayment cost.
services: Fast loan approval (same-day or next-day processing)
Title lien and document stamp tax included in loan amount
Service in multiple Florida counties and zip codes
